demographics.living_situation: lives independently, alone at home this evening

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I had a tooth pulled this morning, and the hole has been pouring blood constantly for eight hours no matter how hard I bite down on the gauze.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The socket keeps bleeding the moment I let go of the gauze, I've filled cups with blood and I'm starting to feel lightheaded — I can't get it to stop at home.

symptom_narrative.onset: straight after a routine molar extraction at about 10am today
symptom_narrative.character: brisk oozing that soaks through the gauze; the socket starts pouring again as soon as I release the pressure
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: I've spat out large amounts of fresh red blood and filled a basin — it just won't stop
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: the socket where the lower back tooth was taken out
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: constant since this morning, not letting up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: biting hard on gauze slows it a little but it restarts every time I let go
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: letting go of the pressure, talking, or checking the wound
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: feeling lightheaded and a bit anxious with all the blood loss
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've always bled and bruised really easily my whole life
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I've been sitting over the sink spitting blood and I feel drained

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: lifelong easy and extensive bruising after even minor knocks
heavy, prolonged periods for as long as I can remember
past_medical_history.how_managed: put up with it; told I was a bit anaemic from it

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: frequent long nosebleeds as a child that took ages to stop

current_medications_as_reported.dose_as_patient_reports: one 400mg tablet taken about 6 hours ago for the dental pain

family_history_as_reported.narrative: a couple of my relatives also bruise and bleed easily and have had trouble with bleeding after operations

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: home alone tonight, no one else present

objective_data_offered.value: I've spat about a cupful, maybe 150 mL, of fresh blood into a basin over the last few hours and soaked through many gauze pads
mouth keeps filling with bright red blood; I look pale in the mirror
I've got several bruises in different colours on my thighs and upper arms that I didn't really injure
I feel lightheaded when I stand up
